mapper.select: select tenant_id as tenantId, calendar_code as calendarCode, timezone as timezone, catch_up_policy as catchUpPolicy, cutoff_time as cutoffTime, late_arrival_tolerance_min as lateArrivalToleranceMin, sla_offset_min as slaOffsetMin from batch.business_calendar where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and calendar_code = #{calendarCode} and enabled = true order by id desc limit 1
